mapper.select: SELECT question_category_id, question_category_name, created_at, deleted_at FROM question_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY question_category_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (question_category_id, line_id, title, content, is_answer, created_at) VALUES (#{questionCategoryId}, #{lineId}, #{title}, #{content}, false, NOW())

INSERT INTO question_attachment (question_id, s3_key, file_size, created_at) VALUES
(#{questionId}, #{att.s3Key}, #{att.fileSize}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE question_attachment SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT question_id, question_category_id, line_id, title, content, is_answer, created_at FROM question WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT question_attachment_id, question_id, s3_key, file_size, created_at FROM question_attachment WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT answer_id, user_id, question_id, content, created_at FROM answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT answer_attachment_id, answer_id, s3_key, file_size, created_at FROM answer_attachment WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
